title: Duplicate match queue guard
description: Prevent the same player/socket from entering the match queue multiple times while already waiting or already in a room.
success_criteria: Repeated MATCH requests while waiting do not create duplicate queue entries.
Players already in a room receive a clear error.
Battle simulation and project files are not modified.
risk_points: Socket-based checks can miss username duplicates after reconnect.
Pending match results must not be dropped accidentally.
